data.name: Hentai Clicker: Cassandra is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Cassandra is streaming

Step into the bewitching world of Cassandra, your naughty witch with emerald eyes and a mischievous grin. Every click stirs her magic, makes her moan, and brings her wicked charms to life. She’s playful, powerful, and ready to cast her dirtiest spells just for you.

🎃 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Cassandra is streaming blends sexy clicker gameplay with a sultry witch fantasy. Each tap charges her magical energy—and her arousal. Collect glowing hearts to unlock lewd outfits, naughty spells, and explicit scenes that reveal just how dangerous her pleasure can get.

🔞 NSFW Scenes

Watch Cassandra transform from a teasing enchantress to a full-blown sex witch. From cheeky incantations and magical teasing to explicit rituals of lust and desire, every animation is dripping with charm, power, and filthy delight.

🎉 Features

🧙‍♀️ Sexy Witch Fantasy – A flirty sorceress who mixes magic with mischief.
🖱️  Clicker Gameplay – Cast, click, and climax—it’s dangerously addictive.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From elegant robes to scandalous lingerie and witchy cosplay.
🔊 Lewd Voice Acting – Gasps, spells, and naughty whispers with every click.
✨ Magic Progression – Stack hearts, boost her arousal, and unlock her most forbidden rituals.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

Cassandra isn’t just a witch—she’s a seductive trickster who loves to play with you. Every spell is a tease, every moan a curse, every climax a ritual. She’ll charm you, tempt you, and leave you bewitched long after you stop clicking.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Cast Spells – Each tap fuels her lust and magical energy.
🔓 Unlock Lewd Rituals – Use your hearts to strip her, pose her, and explore her spells of pleasure.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Amplify her magic, intensify her reactions, and unlock new scenes.

🎉 Let the Witching Begin!

Ready to fall under her spell? 😈
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Cassandra is streaming and let this naughty sorceress show you just how magical lust can be.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
